title: Deep Space Dash
description:
Deep Space Dash 2.0 is a 3rd/1st futuristic space runner that will challenge your focus and dexterity.You are a convict in an intergalactic high-security prison, at an unknown location. 
casual spacey infinite runner game that will challenge you quite a bit.

2.0 update removed modes, added achievements, changed complete game overall.
features:
- 1st/3rd person camera view
- transformation tile (allow destroying blockers for some time)
- fuel instead of time
- shield mechanic
- achievements
- new environment
description_short: Deep Space Dash is a third person futuristic space runner. You are a convict in an intergalactic high-security prison, at an unknown location. You have managed to escape your cell but you are lost in a huge maze.
